label: Automations & Valves
items: Run history now tells the truth when a valve couldn't be reached — failed runs show as Failed (or Partial) with the reason, instead of a green Success.

Fixed the valve control showing 'Off' while a bridge-connected (Zigbee) valve was actually running — the state check now asks the valve itself, and Turn Off is always available unless the valve is confirmed off.

label: Garden AI
items: Clearer chat errors — when the AI service itself is down you now see "Rhozly's AI is temporarily unavailable" instead of a generic error, and hitting your daily message limit shows the actual limit message.
Failed messages no longer leave empty AI bubbles in your chat history.
